title: iberis × bretonii
intro: Iberis × bretonii, also known as Breton candytuft, is a hybrid plant species within the Brassicaceae family, resulting from the cross between Iberis amara and Iberis sempervirens. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Iberis × bretonii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
